data.title: VOXEL rose above 0.07 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 143%.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that VOXEL rose above 0.07USDT and is now at 0.0675 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 143%.
In addition, according to Coinglass data, the total VOXEL liquidation amount in the past 4 hours reached 2.03 million US dollars, of which long orders were liquidated at 112,700 US dollars and short orders were liquidated at 1.9181 million US dollars. In the past 4 hours, the amount of VOXEL liquidation ranked first in the entire network.

data.title: Babylon Proposes Changes to Bitcoin Staking Fees
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin staking protocol Babylon has announced on Platform X that a governance proposal to modify the parameters of the Babylon Genesis chain is now live. The proposal aims to reduce the unbinding fee for the second phase of staking from 100 sats/vbyte to 30 sats/vbyte. Voting on this proposal is currently open and will conclude on Monday, April 21, 2025, at 7 a.m. UTC.

data.title: Schwab CEO Anticipates Launch of Direct Spot Cryptocurrency Trading
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Nate Geraci, President of The ETF Store, shared on X that Schwab CEO Rick Wurster expects to introduce direct spot cryptocurrency trading within the next 12 months. This move is anticipated to become a strategic focus for major brokerage firms.

Rick Wurster indicated that Schwab is progressing steadily towards offering direct spot cryptocurrency trading, in line with evolving regulatory conditions. However, he cautioned that due to the volatility of cryptocurrency prices and the potential for the total value of crypto investments to vanish, investors who are unable to withstand significant risk and market fluctuations might choose to avoid such investments.

data.title: After unlocking $320 million, TRUMP rose 9% against the trend, but is still more than 88% below its peak.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: TRUMP rose more than 9% within 24 hours after unlocking $320 million in tokens. The current price is about $8.26, but it is still down more than 88% from its high in January. Although liquidity is poor, $1.3 million can drive price fluctuations by 2%, but the market seems to have digested the unlocking expectations in advance. There are currently 636,000 coin holding addresses, and less than 2% of them hold more than $1,000. Social platforms circulate that Trump himself may organize coin holder activities, which has not yet been confirmed. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Sonic Labs: Plans to launch .sonic domain name public sale next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sonic Labs posted on the X platform that the .sonic domain name is ready, users can now check their emails, and users on the waiting list can already claim the domain name on Unstoppable Domains. The public sale of the .sonic domain name is scheduled to start next week.
